seoTitle: Old Toongabbie vs Olinda — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Old Toongabbie vs Olinda: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Old Toongabbie and Olinda.
heading: Old Toongabbie vs Olinda — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Old Toongabbie, New South Wales and Olinda, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Olinda has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Old Toongabbie (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Old Toongabbie or Olinda safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Old Toongabbie has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Olinda scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Old Toongabbie scores 35/100 for bushfire risk. Olinda scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Old Toongabbie or Olinda?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Olinda has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.28% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
